synopsis: Star Wars: Droids: The Kalarba Adventures is a trade paperback published by Dark Horse Comics in June 1995. With an introduction by Anthony Daniels, The Kalarba Adventures collects the Droids Special, the six issues of Star Wars: Droids (1994), the short comic issue "Artoo's Day Out", and production sketches from Droids.
title: Droids: The Kalarba Adventures (1995)
